name: content_creation
success_criteria: A polished, peer-reviewed piece of content is finalised and ready for publication or delivery.

tasks.title: Define brief
tasks.description: Clarify the content goal, target audience, format, tone, length, and success metrics.

tasks.title: Create outline
tasks.description: Structure the content: define sections, key messages per section, and the logical flow.

tasks.title: Write draft
tasks.description: Produce the first full draft following the outline. Focus on completeness over perfection.

tasks.title: Gather references
tasks.description: Collect supporting sources, data, quotes, and visuals that will strengthen the content.

tasks.title: Peer review
tasks.description: Have at least one reviewer assess the draft for accuracy, clarity, tone, and completeness.

tasks.title: Revise
tasks.description: Incorporate review feedback. Address all critical comments before finalisation.

tasks.title: Finalise
tasks.description: Apply final formatting, proofread, and approve for publication or delivery.
